package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "io"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "os"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for bufio_writer_missing_in_bulk_export: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: File or socket writes inside loops without visible bufio buffering.
type CaseBufioWriterMissingInBulkExportDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseBufioWriterMissingInBulkExportModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseBufioWriterMissingInBulkExportRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseBufioWriterMissingInBulkExportModel
}

type CaseBufioWriterMissingInBulkExportService struct {
    repo *CaseBufioWriterMissingInBulkExportRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseBufioWriterMissingInBulkExportAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveBufioWriterMissingInBulkExport(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseBufioWriterMissingInBulkExportDTO) error {
    focus := "bufio_writer_missing_in_bulk"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    start := time.Now()
    _ = start
    file, _ := os.Open(input)
    io.ReadAll(file)
    bufio_writer_missing_bulk_export_positive := map[string]int{"bufio": 1, "writer": 2, "missing": 3, "bulk": 4, "export": 5}
    bufio_writer_missing_bulk_export_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    bufio_positive_0 := bufio_writer_missing_bulk_export_positive["bufio"] + len(input)
    _ = bufio_positive_0
    writer_positive_1 := bufio_writer_missing_bulk_export_positive["writer"] + len(input)
    _ = writer_positive_1
    missing_positive_2 := bufio_writer_missing_bulk_export_positive["missing"] + len(input)
    _ = missing_positive_2
    bulk_positive_3 := bufio_writer_missing_bulk_export_positive["bulk"] + len(input)
    _ = bulk_positive_3
    export_positive_4 := bufio_writer_missing_bulk_export_positive["export"] + len(input)
    _ = export_positive_4
    return nil
}
